entry.title: Re: Access SAP CAP change tracking plugin table in a cust...
entry.content: Figured it out, my SELECT statement was not correct, it should be: SELECT.from("sap.changelog.ChangeView").

entry.title: Re: 2 MDK controls on horizontal layout MDK

entry.title: Re: SAP GIU Auto Completion MacOS
entry.content: Not working, i use GUI JAVA v7.80 rev 7

entry.title: Behaviour of Edit Flow / OnBeforeCreate overide in a draft enabled Fiori Elements Application
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we "overrode" above mentioned method in our draft enabled application to be able to request data from the user not concerning the object to be edited. If the user does not enter anything, creation should be stopped.

Unfortunately before our additional popup the standard Fiori Elements dialog requesting the key value of the object to be created is shown. 

Is there any way to avoid this?

Best regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content: May I know which function module you are using?

entry.title: OAuth 2.0 SAML Assertion Access Token Generator for SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am checking several blog for generate the OAuth 2.0 SAML Assertion Access Token Generator for SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite.

With the following options in the  blog work fine:

How to use Postman to call SuccessFactors API usin... - SAP Community

Postman to call SuccessFactors API using OAuth aut... - SAP Community

However I have a doubt with this option :

https://github.com/piejanssens/sf-oauth?tab=readme-ov-file#installation 

In the step Generate a new key pair: when I run the command.

$ sf-oauth --newkeypair
...

The response is and I dont know what to do?

 

Regards

Thanks in advanced.
@DellSC

entry.title: Re: Golden transactions in SAP S/4 Professional Services

The approach you've mentioned was one of the options in our list and most likely we will be going ahead with this. We are in the process of identifying few friendly users who can run the transactions live, at bare minimum level at least during the weekend before go-live.

entry.title: Re: Deactivate Group Reporting Preparation Ledger
entry.content: You need to create customer incident to SAP and explain the reason why you need to deactivate or postpone the GRPL. And there might be couple of additional steps required such as changes to consolidation unit definition once SAP support agrees and deactivates the GRPL via the incident communication channel. You could get more details in note 3234878-GRPL: group reporting fields cannot be filled

entry.title: Re: Unable to create delivery in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

If You have different data and You receive message "delivery split due to conflicting header data" You need to create two different delivery. You can use app F0869A. 

Best regards

entry.title: Dynamic Measure Filtering Using Input Fields in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
🚀Problem Statement

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), users often need to filter data in tables with both dimension and measure input controls. Typically, you can use:

  • Dimension Filters to filter based on text or categorical data.
  • Measure Filters to filter numeric data like totals, averages, or sales values.

However, when tables are dynamic (due to dimension and measure input controls), a direct measure filter using scripting is not available. This limitation creates the need for a custom solution.

🧩 Challenges Faced

  1. No Direct Measure Filtering: SAC supports filtering dimensions using setDimensionFilter() but lacks a direct way to filter measures through scripts.
  2. Limited Scripting Functions: Functions like isNaN(), null, and ! are not available, making error handling difficult.
  3. Dynamic Table Complexity: Since the table structure is not static, traditional filters cannot be applied easily.

✅Output

Filter.gif

 

 🛠️ Solution Approach

To overcome these challenges, we use a calculated measure combined with scripting. Here’s a structured approach:

✅Step 1: Create a Script Variable

  • Navigate to the Story in SAC.
  • Create a Script Variable to capture user input.
  • Provide required details such as,
  •  Name: ScriptVariable_1
  • Description: CatputreIP
  • Type: Integer (since we going to capture measure)
  • Default value: 0
  • Enable Expose variable and enable dynamic URL

 

✅Step 2: Create an Input Field and Link to Script Variable

  1. Add an Input Field:
    • Input field is used to get the value from the user.

 

    • Data Source: Script variable
    • Binding display: Map the created Script variable
    • Make sure enable the write-back runtime. (It will dynamically fetch the value without a apply button)
    • Map the script variable to the write-back runtime.

 

Ensure Real-Time Update:

    • The input field should update the script variable whenever the user enters a value.

✅Step 3: Create a Calculated Measure

  • Go to your SAC Model and create a Calculated Measure using the formula:

 

IF ("Total Sales" >= ScriptVariable_1, "Total Sales")

 

Explanation:

  • ScriptVaraible_1 stores the user input.
  • Displays the Total Sales value, only if it greater than or equals the input threshold.

✅Step 4: Add the Calculated Measure to the Table

  • Add a Table:
    • Connect it to your data model.
    • Display the calculated measure in a column.

✅Step 5: Handle Empty Input with Scripting

If no input is provided, SAC won't display any data since the calculated measure in the table awaits input. To address this, the following script ensures the input value defaults to 0 if left empty.

  • Forgotten Reset: If users apply a filter and forget to enter a new input, no data will appear. The script ensures the input resets to 0 in such cases.
  • Continuous Monitoring: After applying the filter, users can still adjust the threshold dynamically without facing data unavailability.

 

 

Script Code:

// Get the input value

var inputValue = InputField_1.getValue();

 

// Check if the input field is empty using a boolean comparison

var isEmpty = inputValue === "";

 

// Set the input to "0" if it is empty

if (isEmpty) {

    inputValue = "0";

    InputField_1.setValue("0"); // Reflect 0 in the input field

}

 

// Show a success message

Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success, "Total Sales filter value set to: " + inputValue);

 

 

💡Explanation:

  • inputField_Sales.getValue(): Captures user input.
  • inputValue === "": Checks if the input field is empty.
  • inputField_Sales.setValue(): Ensures input is set to 0 if empty.
  • Application.showMessage(): Provides feedback to users.

⚙️UI/UX enhancement:

  • Create a clear filter functionality, in my case I have used an image to clear the value.

 

 

🎯Conclusion

This approach effectively handles dynamic measure filtering using input fields and scripting in SAC. Users can confidently filter data based on their criteria, while ensuring a smooth user experience with clear feedback.

entry.title: Access to Purchased SAP Learning Hub to do stay current not possible
entry.content:
Hi,

I recently purchased a license for SAP Learning Hub. However, when I log into https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/subscription, I am unable to see any Learning Hub product associated with my account.

As a result, when I try to access the "Stay Certified" section for my existing certifications via https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/certifications, I’m redirected to https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html as if I need to purchase a new subscription. When I click “Buy Now,” I receive a message stating: “We found an active subscription of SAP Learning Hub for your company”, which confirms that the license is active.

Additionally, when accessing https://me.sap.com, I noticed that the license assigned to my account is listed as SAP Learning Hub, partner edition. However, during the purchase process, I specifically selected the standard edition, and I never had the option to choose the partner edition.

I already contacted SAP Learning Support (Case ID: 5000126579), but I only received basic troubleshooting steps, which unfortunately did not resolve the issue.

As time is critical to maintain my certifications, I kindly request your urgent support in resolving this access problem.

My S-User ID: 0026809695

Thank you in advance for your prompt assistance.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a Function Module in AMDP?
entry.content:
Hi 
So far I know it's not possible, but to serve the purpose we can go with virtual elements. In that we have a class where we call the required FM within respective method. 

Regards,
Nil

entry.title: Re: Could Race Conditions Occur in This SAP CAP Scenario?
entry.content:
Hello @fabi2295 ,

Please verify if SAP CAP's locking mechanisms can help prevent req.user and cds.context from being overwritten by concurrent requests. 

Please refer: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-ql#forupdate

entry.title: Re: Could Race Conditions Occur in This SAP CAP Scenario?
entry.content: Hello @rayyavu, thank you for responding. From what I understand, this mechanism you sent me is for concurrent access to the table. In my case, the req is updated by the CAP and the cds.context.

entry.title: SAC Advanced trial: Starting the trial no longer possible?
entry.content:
I just tried to start a new SAC advanced trial since I missed to extend my trial which I started beginning of february. Therefore it expired after just 30 days.

When I tried to register for a new advanced trial here,

SAP Analytics Cloud Trial | Cloud BI, Predictive, and Planning

I got the following message:

"Thank you for your interest in SAP.
 

Get your free trial

Unfortunately, a technical error occurred when processing your request. Please try again

This did not happen only to me but to a lot of other people I know.
Does anybody knows what is going on here?

Best regards,

Joachim

entry.title: Secondary level packing not happening as per Batch
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have business scenario where number of finished goods are packed in cartons(Primary packing) and loaded on pallets(Secondary packing). We have created 2 packing instructions where in first packing instruction, material is packed in carton. The second packing instruction has pallets and first packing instruction which is assigned to access sequence. The automatic packing is working correctly.

There is specific business requirement where batch split happens at the time of delivery. For each batch there should be separate primary are creating nested packing instruction for multilevel packing.

As per automatic packing proposal, materials are getting packed as per batch at primary packing level. However, secondary packing is done without considering batch split. We need to consider secondary packing as per batch.


At delivery item category level, we have unticked Pack accumulated batches / movement type item indicator in item category split.

Kindly guide on configuration setting or routine needs to be developed. We are working on SAP S4 hana 1709 version.

entry.title: Get outbound delivery information from warehouse task
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to get outbound delivery information in BADI implementation /SCWM/EX_ASR_WMTORD_OUT.

I have WT, WO and stock guid. How can I get outbound delivery information based on available data?

Scenario:

Its a partial pick scenario after triggering a kanban for partial quantity(not a regular scenario) 2 WT gets triggered 1 for needed quantity and 1 for remaining quantity. In first WT reference of outbound delivery is there but in second WT reference of outbound delivery is not present.

I have completed all the steps but am still unsure where the geocoding URL should be directed.
Should it be set as an RFC Destination, or does it need to be linked to the tables
VBIC_SERV_URL / VBCC_SERV_URL ?
Thank you in advance!
Dmitry.

entry.title: can not see add button in List report
entry.content:
Hello,

I have tried many configuration with no success.

In list report form, the add button does not appear, only the delete one. I have verified cap service and it works for insert/update/delete/select.

is there any missing configuration ?

 

Thank you!

 

entity Doctor: managed {

}

@Capabilities.SortRestrictions.NonSortableProperties : [createdAt,createdBy,modifiedAt,modifiedBy]
    entity DoctorSet as projection on medicalcare.Doctor;
 
"targets": {
        "DoctorSetList": {
          "type": "Component",
          "id": "DoctorSetList",
          "name": "sap.fe.templates.ListReport",          
          "options": {            
            "settings": {              
              "contextPath": "/DoctorSet",
              "variantManagement": "Page",
              "navigation": {
                "DoctorSet": {
                  "detail": {
                    "route": "DoctorSetObjectPage"
                  }
                }
              },
              "requiredActions": {
                  "Create": true
              },
              "initialLoad": true,
              "controlConfiguration": {
                "@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem": {
                  "tableSettings": {
                    "type": "ResponsiveTable"
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "DoctorSetObjectPage": {
          "type": "Component",
          "id": "DoctorSetObjectPage",
          "name": "sap.fe.templates.ObjectPage",
          "options": {
            "settings": {
              "editableHeaderContent": false,
              "contextPath": "/DoctorSet"
            }
          }
        }
      }

entry.title: Re: Manually Testing SAP BTP ABAP Environment APIs with Postman using OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code G
entry.content:
The Token is received by postman and set in Auth Header.

Still it does not work. I get html response which is as good as   not being authorized. 

There is something else missing probably related to IAS set up

The cookie method works for now and you can use Postman Interceptor to sync cookies so that as long as you are logged in your browser the Postman will work . The set up is only needed once

https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/capturing-request-data/syncing-cookies/

entry.title: How to retrieve single record in cloud functions in sap build apps
entry.content: One of our requirements is to preload the page with whatever data is stored in the application backend upon opening of the app. The simplest way (I think) is to create a data variable that retrieves a single data record using current logged in user's information (for this particular case, I am thinking of using the email). Returned data will then be saved as a variable to pre-populate fields. The problem is, retrieving a single record from the entity requires me to pass the id, which is, by default, an automatically generated uuid upon data creation. Is there a way to retrieve a single record without passing the uuid, instead pass a different input that can uniquely identify the entry (user's email)? If not, how can I get the uuid that I need to retrieve the single entry?

entry.title: Integrating SAP Cloud Identity Services (Identity Authentication - IAS) with SAP Audit Log Viewer
entry.content:
Previous Blog : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-enable-sap-audit-log-viewer-service-to-collect-all-audit-logs-from/ba-p/14037435 

Accessing Audit Logs for Identity Authentication Tenants

To access the audit logs for changes in personal data, successful, and failed authentications for Identity Authentication tenants on both SAP, AWS, and Azure infrastructures, you can use the Audit Log Service in SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry. This process is essential for organizations that require detailed auditing to ensure that changes are tracked accurately.

Why is this Important?

Auditing is crucial for maintaining the integrity and security of your organization's data. By tracking who made changes, you can ensure accountability and transparency within your system.

Steps to Access Audit Logs

  1. Navigate to the Audit Log Service: Access the Audit Log Service in SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry.
  2. Filter Logs: Use filters to view logs related to changes in personal data, successful authentications, and failed authentications.
  3. Review and Analyze: Carefully review the logs to identify any unauthorized changes or any suspicious activities.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Security: By monitoring audit logs, you can detect and respond to security breaches promptly.
  • Compliance: Ensure your organization meets regulatory requirements for data protection and privacy.
  • Accountability: Track changes to identify responsible parties and maintain accountability

Prerequisites for enabling Auditlogs Viewer for SAP Identity Authentication - Audit logs

Pick your subaccount details and you must have SAP Cloud Identity Services and Auditlog Viewer Services enabled already.

Once above details are available, you can now follow the below steps to tie the application between SAP Cloud Identity Services and Auditlog Viewer Services

Step 1 : Login to your SAP Cloud Identity Services - Admin and go to Monitoring & Reporting Tile

Step 2 : Click Add to update configuration of your SAP BTP Tenant details (from above prerequisites steps)

Step 3 : Update your BTP Tenant Id and Subdomain which should match to the region shown in dropdown. List of available regions are in below link.List of Available Regions for Identity Authentication - Cloud Foundry Regions Mapping

Step 4: Once configured,you will be able to see the Subaccount Information and Auditlog viewer Link and you will have to wait for 15-20mins once configured to see the logs in Auditlog Viewer Portal.

Step 5 : Upon accessing the Audit Log Viewer, you have the option to filter the logs based on date and keyword filters.

The audit logs provide information about the event category and timestamp, the event and object type, who performed the action and others.

entry.title: Advanced Event Mesh for Central contracts
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are implementing Advanced Event Mesh to integrate with our S/4 HANA system for Central Purchase Contracts, following the guidelines from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub blog: https://api.sap.com/event/OP_CENTRALPURCHASECONTRACTEVENTS/resource.

To facilitate this, we have configured the following topics for publishing events related to Central Purchase Contracts:

  • (i) ce/sap/s4/beh/centralpurchasecontract/v1/CentralPurchaseContract/Changed/v1
  • (ii) ce/sap/s4/beh/centralpurchasecontract/v1/CentralPurchaseContract/Created/v1

These topics will receive events corresponding to changes and creation of Central Purchase Contracts, respectively.

We have also created a single queue to subscribe to both of these topics. This setup has been tested successfully by publishing messages to the specified topics using Postman.

Please see below screenshot that shows test is successful from postman and it returns 200 OK status.

 

 

 

Now, we are trying to create channel with topic endpoints on S4HANA backend but we get the following errors while trying to do so.

Would you be able to guide regarding this ? or kindly help me to know if someone already something similar to push the events for S/4HANA?

Please find below screenshots regarding Channel configuration on S/4 HANA backend.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Business Address Services (BAS)
entry.content: I see it's been a while since this topic was discussed, but I’d love to chime in. Have you found a good solution for handling address changes efficiently? I've noticed that sometimes updates don’t sync properly across systems, which can cause issues. If anyone has tips on keeping address data consistent, I’d appreciate hearing them. Has anyone tried automating this process to reduce manual work?

entry.title: Cost centers master data : How to correct company code
entry.content:
Hello experts, need your help please !

Is there a way to correct assigned company code in cost centers master data without changing the cost centers codes  (The company code used in the initial LTMC file was not the good one.) ? Or I must absolutely create the using new codes ?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Fiori App on BAS + BOPF + CDS Annotation
entry.content: Do we need annotations for that ? I thought the BOPF will take care by itself..if yes, what would it be?

entry.title: Business Function - LOG_MM_MAA_1 clarification in S/4 HANA transformation
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on an S/4 HANA transformation project (i.e ECC6.0 EhP8 to S/4 HANA 2023 SP02) and below mentioned Business Function is showing under "Always On Business Functions" list. 

LOG_MM_MAA_1-  MM Multiple Account Assignment

But in the details of above BF, in "Integration part" it is also mentioning that BF- LOG_MM_MAA_1 cannot be activated with /CWM/CM_1. My customer uses /CWM/CW_1. That is contradicting to the SAP report that this BF LOG_MM_MAA_1 will be in "Always On" list of BF's.

Do you know whether they can co-exist in S/4 HANA 2023 SP02 or what will happen when Catch Weight Management new architecture BF is already activated in ECC?

Do you know whether activation of this BF- LOG_MM_MAA_1 will have any impact in Multiple Acocunt Assignment processes in S/4 HANA?

*********

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/930f133a36a843318dc3347afe00a9d6/7b1ceeafd3644297a38e9f6af859be9c.html?version=6.18.latest

"Integration
You cannot activate this business function together with one or both of the following business functions:
Catch Weight Management Business Function (/CWM/BF)
CWM, New Architecture: Inventory Management and Accounting in ERP (/CWM/CM_1)"

**********

Regards

Vineeth

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now server
entry.content:
Hi Mohammed,

You can find the server requirements in the Enable Now System Requirements, On Premise Edition document.  Windows Server 2016 and 2019 are the supported operating systems.  Doesn't mean that 2022 will not work but it has not been tested.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: non stock items in EWM
entry.content: Sorry, mis-commented here and there's no delete function, please ignore. 🙂

entry.title: Re: PO Unit Price Exceeds Budget – Approval Query Issue
entry.content:
Hi, I understand what you mean, and I have updated my query as follows:
SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE' FROM POR1 T1
INNER JOIN OBGT T2 ON T2."AcctCode" = T1."AcctCode"
INNER JOIN BGT1 T3 ON T2."AbsId" = T3."BudgId"
WHERE $[$38.14.NUMBER] > T2."DebLTotal"
AND T2."DebLTotal" > 0
AND T2."FinancYear" = '2025-01-01'

However, the approval process still triggers even when I enter a unit price below the annual budget assigned to the G/L account. I can't figure out why this is happening.

entry.title: Re: PO Unit Price Exceeds Budget – Approval Query Issue
entry.content:
Additionally, when I convert this into a regular query, documents that went for approval are not listed in the query results, even though the unit price I entered is lower than the budget assigned to the G/L account.

SELECT T1."DocEntry", T1."Price",T2."DebLTotal", T2."AcctCode" , T1."AcctCode", T2."FinancYear" FROM POR1 T1
INNER JOIN OBGT T2 ON T2."AcctCode" = T1."AcctCode"
INNER JOIN BGT1 T3 ON T2."AbsId" = T3."BudgId"
WHERE T1."LineTotal" > T2."DebLTotal"
AND T2."DebLTotal" > 0
AND T2."FinancYear" = '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY T1."DocEntry", T1."Price",T2."DebLTotal", T2."AcctCode" , T1."AcctCode", T2."FinancYear"

entry.title: ¡Gracias Sandra Solís por inspirar a nuestra comunidad SAP!
entry.content:
¡Qué maravilla de charla virtual tuvimos! Nuestra "CONEXIÓN LATINA EN SAP" con Sandra Solís nos dejó llenos de energía y motivación. Quiero tomarme un momento para agradecer a todos los que formaron parte de este encuentro tan especial.

Lo que aprendimos juntos
Entre risas, anécdotas y mucho conocimiento técnico, descubrimos:

  • Que la comunidad SAP global está más cerca de lo que creemos
  • Que podemos participar en eventos internacionales desde Paraguay
  • La importancia de vencer el miedo y animarse a compartir conocimiento
  • Que ser latino en el mundo SAP puede ser nuestra mayor fortaleza

Recursos que Sandra nos compartió
Sandra fue súper generosa al compartir estos recursos que todos deberíamos aprovechar:

  • Comunidad SAP (novedades y chismecitos): https://community.sap.com/
  • Cursos gratuitos: https://learning.sap.com/
  • Tutoriales + insignias: https://developers.sap.com/tutorial-navigator.html
  • Devtoberfest info: https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/gh-p/Devtoberfest
  • SAP TechEd + replays: https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html


¿Te perdiste el evento o quieres volver a verlo? No hay problema:

Mira la grabación completa en
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bng59RqvHPI&t=135s
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/events/7308486591407136768/comments

Te invitamos a:

Aventurarte a explorar los recursos que Sandra compartió
Animarte a participar en la comunidad, aunque al principio dé un poco de miedo
Conectarte con otros apasionados por SAP en Paraguay y Latinoamérica

Y prepárate porque... ¡Estamos planeando un SAP Inside Track Paraguay para finales de año! Sandra ya está invitada, ¿te sumas vos también?

Gracias a Todos

Sandra, mil gracias por compartir tu tiempo y experiencia con nosotros. Tu historia desde tus inicios en ABAP hasta convertirte en SAP Champion y crear #MundoAbaper nos mostró que, con pasión y determinación, los latinos podemos llegar muy lejos en el ecosistema SAP.
Escucharte hablar sobre cómo balanceas tu trabajo como consultora ABAP con la creación de contenido, tus experiencias en el Devtoberfest y tus viajes a Estados Unidos fue verdaderamente inspirador.

Y por supuesto, gracias a todos y a cada uno de ustedes que se tomó el tiempo para conectarse.

Nos vemos en la próxima, 
Zami

entry.title: Late Lock and Non Exclusive Locking in S/4 HANA in Materials Document processing
entry.content:
Hi,

We are migration from EEC6.0 EhP8 to S4 HANA 2023 SP02 and I am looking for a clarification regarding the optional feature of "Non Exclusive Locking" for Materials Document processing to improve transactional data throughput. In SAP Note 2319579 it is mentioning that

"Solution
Switching the lock strategies
The strategy late lock/non-exclusive seems to be a good strategy if - by business means - it is ensured that goods receipt postings are always be processed before goods issue or transfer postings are done."

SPRO> Materials Management> General Settings for Materials Management> Set material block for goods movements

Do SAP recommend Late Lock and Non Exclusive Locking together, if the customer allows negative stock postings?

In ECC, the customer have configured Late Lock and allows negative stock posting. When we transform to S/4 HANA, the new field "Non Exclusive Locking will appear and it is optional to choose. So I am looking for some clarity. The above statement in the Note in Solution is a bit unclear for me.

Regards

VV

entry.title: Re: non stock items in EWM
entry.content:
If there's no material number, you cannot handle the material directly in EWM.

1. The question is: Do the goods have to be handled in EWM?

--> If yes: Do they have to be handled based on pieces in EWM? If yes, go to step 2.

--> If No, go to question 3.

2. Do the goods have to be handled in EWM on a HU basis (pallets, cartons) and no repacking has to be done?

--> If yes: handle the goods via HUs with your own HU identification as a free text to identify the HU contents.

--> If no: Go to question 3.

3. Do the goods have to be handled in IM/SD?

You can create text items in deliveries and purchasing orders OR use material type NLAG for this. Then you can do GR postings, but they will not be sent to EWM and they will not be posted quantity-wise, only value-wise (i.e. purchasing order item value).

entry.title: Re: Get outbound delivery information from warehouse task
entry.content:
Hi,

if the WT that should be sent in the IDoc is a pick WT, use RDOCCAT, RDOCID, RITMID to read the delivery. You can read the delivery with class /SCWM/CL_DLV_MANAGEMENT_PRD, method QUERY, using DOCCAT, DOCID, ITEMID.

If it is not a pick WT and the stock already has a reference to the PDO, use the fields QDOCCAT, QDOCID, QITMID.

entry.title: Juntada SAP Paraguay: Conquistando el Este!
entry.content:
¿Te perdiste la primera? ¡Esta no te la puedes perder!
¿Viniste a la primera? ¡Entonces ya sabes que esto va a estar buenísimo!

¡La comunidad SAP se expande por todo Paraguay! En esta Oportunidad CDE

¿Cansado de ver solo iniciales en correos de proyecto? ¿De preguntarte si ese BASIS realmente existe o es un bot muy eficiente? ¡Llegó el momento de vernos en resolución 4K y no en píxeles de Teams!

Después del éxito rotundo en Asunción, ¡es hora de que la comunidad SAP tome Ciudad del Este por asalto! Te invitamos a la segunda juntada oficial en el increíble VARE'A GOURMET FOOD PARK (Area 3) el 11 de abril a las 18:30 hs.

¿El plan? ¡Súper simple! Juntarnos en un ambiente relajado para conocer a todos esos rostros detrás de los proyectos SAP en Paraguay. Nada de presentaciones formales ni corbatas - solo buena onda, algunas risas y la oportunidad de hacer networking de la manera más divertida posible.

¿Por qué deberías venir?

  • Conocer a la comunidad SAP del Este del país en 3D (¡sin lag ni congelamiento de video!)
  • Intercambiar historias de terror sobre tus go-lives (sabemos que tienes varias)
  • Reírte de los memes de SAP que solo nosotros entendemos
  • ¡Y sí! Tal vez encontrar a ese consultor funcional que te salvó la vida en aquel proyecto

Empezamos a las 18:30 hs y seguimos hasta que el último HANA termine de cargar o nos echen del lugar (lo que ocurra primero)

Detalles importantes:

Fecha: 11 de abril de 2025
Hora: 18:30 hs
Lugar: VARE'A GOURMET FOOD PARK
Ubicación: https://maps.app.goo.gl/tTyCEDR1LJBbxEGh9
Código de vestimenta: Vení como quieras, pero recordá que las fotos quedan para la posteridad (y posiblemente en LinkedIn). ¡No nos hacemos responsables si aparecés en un meme SAP!

Nota: Como siempre, cada uno maneja su presupuesto. VARE'A tiene opciones para todos.

¡Confirma tu asistencia!

Haz clic en la sección de RSVP para que sepamos cuántos SAPeros tomarán Ciudad del Este. ¡No hay límite, pero nos ayuda a organizarnos mejor!

¿Preguntas? ¿Sugerencias? ¿Quieres proponer un tema de conversación? Déjanos un comentario abajo.

#SAPParaguay #ComunidadSAP #CiudadDelEste #Networking

¡Nos vemos en el Este!
Zami

entry.title: SAP Functional Analyst (New Grad)
entry.content:
Location: Onsite in Chicago 

 You can apply here

 

Enabling What’s Next 

Who We Are  

Established in 2004 as Techedge, with the addition of NIMBL in 2018, we have nearly 20 years of expertise that enabled us to become what we are today: Avvale! This path led us to have a presence in 11 countries with 3,000 Consultants worldwide. 

 

What We Do 

We partner with public and private companies to re-design their business models through the development of innovative and sustainable solutions. Our mission is to have a positive impact not only on our customers but the world we live in! 

 

How we do it 

Through circular economy models we are bridging the gap between sustainability and profitability. 

 

What you’ll do on the team 

Are you a problem solver who loves learning, adapting, and staying ahead of the latest trends in technology? Do you thrive in fast-paced environments where no two days are the same? If so, Avvale’s SAP New Graduate Training & Development Program might be the perfect place to launch your consulting career.  

 

At Avvale, we’re looking for new or recent graduates interested in being their career as a consultant - if you are naturally curious, solution-driven, and excited by the challenge of helping businesses leverage technology like SAP to optimize their operations this might be what you’re looking for.  

 

Your first two weeks at Avvale will be a structured SAP training, after which will continue to learn through a hand-on rotation working on real-world projects, gaining practical experience in key SAP areas:  

 

  • Finance & Controlling (FICO) – Helping businesses manage financial processes, reporting, and compliance.  
  • Supply Chain & Manufacturing (SCM/MFG) – Supporting procurement, inventory, production planning, and logistics.  
  • Sales & Distribution (SD/OTC) – Optimizing order-to-cash, pricing, billing, and customer service processes.  

  

What You’ll Do  

  • Develop a consultant mindset—you’ll learn how to analyze business needs, ask the right questions, and recommend solutions.  
  • Participate in an immersive training program covering SAP fundamentals, configuration, and best practices.  
  • Solve real business problems by working alongside experienced consultants on live SAP projects.  
  • Gather and document business requirements while advising on how SAP can drive efficiency and growth.  
  • Configure SAP systems, test new functionalities, and provide support during implementations.  
  • Research and document industry best practices and new SAP innovations to help clients stay ahead of the curve.  
  • Communicate technical and business concepts clearly to both technical teams and business stakeholders.  
  • Participate in system demonstrations and client workshops to develop consulting and presentation skills.  

  

Who You Are  

  • A curious problem solver who enjoys analyzing complex challenges and coming up with innovative solutions.  
  • A lifelong learner who stays up to date with technology trends and enjoys continuous professional development through ongoing SAP led training and hands on experiences. 
  • A team player with strong communication and collaboration skills, comfortable interacting with both technical teams and business leaders. 
  • Proactive in taking ownership of tasks and looking for opportunities to improve processes and outcomes. 
  • Entrepreneurial and self-motivated, with the ability to take initiative and drive your own growth.  
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, client-facing environment, with the ability to think on your feet and adapt quickly.  
  • Develop leadership and strategic thinking skills as you take on more responsibility, mentor others, and contribute to team and project management. 

  

What You’ll Bring   

  • A Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Supply Chain, Manufacturing, Industrial Engineering, Information Systems, Business Administration, or a related field.  
  • Academic or internship experience in Finance, Supply Chain, Sales, Manufacturing, Operations, ERP systems or related area (SAP exposure is a plus).  
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a focus on process improvement.  
  • An ability to motivate and influence others toward a common goal.  
  • A cool head under pressure—consulting can be challenging, but you thrive in dynamic environments.  

 

Come with us 

We are a dynamic team within a meritocratic context offering individualized professional career opportunities that allow you to use smart working practices to find work-life balance. You will have the opportunity to define a “tailor made'' growth path while working alongside expert coaches allowing you to deepen your technical skills and increase your know-how! 

 

Base salary: 65k 
- As participant of Avvale’s SAP New Graduate Training & Development Program you will be on an accelerated growth path with performance reviews every six months. You will be eligible for discretionary performance-based bonuses and salary increases tied to your progress.   

 

We offer a variety of benefits including but not limited to: 

  • Comprehensive healthcare benefits including medical, dental, vision, FSA, HSA, life and disability 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Flexible vacation, 10 paid sick days and 8 paid holidays 
  • 401k with an employer match 
  • Paid parental leave 

 

Apply here

entry.title: [REQ 2YM] SAP_COM_0256 doesn't show up
entry.content:
Came out of a customer case:

Scope item was activated but the SAP_COM_0256 communication scenario does't show up in the Manage Communication Scenario app, why?

entry.title: Re: [REQ 2YM] SAP_COM_0256 doesn't show up
entry.content:
Communication scenario SAP_COM_0256 is deprecated, please use/search for SAP_COM_0316 instead.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Authorization Error Setting Up SOAP Connection from S...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

on which release are you? Are you on Public Cloud or Private Cloud?

 

SAP_COM_0256 is deprecated and should not be used anymore,SAP_COM_0316 is the successor.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Schedule a service that triggers the flow between from the Input of Start and End Time
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario in which the flow needs to be scheduled every 10 minutes with an input value of LastRunDateTime. This LastRunDateTime should be an input so that the queries inside the flow will execute between the dates (StartDateTime and LastRunDateTime), where the StartDateTime will be CurrentDateTime obtained within the flow.

 

How to get this done in SAP BTP? I am pretty new to this product hence trying to get suggestions.

entry.title: Re: Nota Técnica 2023.001: tributação monofásica sobre combustíveis
entry.content:

As condições ICM5 e ICM6 não aparecem na pricing após seguis os passos manuais da nota Implementation_Guide_SAP_Note_3309014_V1.1 .

Com ativar essas condições para que as mesmas possam fazer o calculo do IMCS monofásico ?

Obrigado.

entry.title: Application to profile synchronisation SAP Recruiting
entry.content:
Hello experts,

when changing the email address and resume in the application form, only the resume is updated in the candidate profile, Any explanation please?

entry.title: Re: Old System Keeps Reappearing in SOLMAN 7.2 After Dele...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The ABAP system is sent to SLD via transaction RZ70. Please run RZ70 and "Delete Background Job" and remove the RFC or HTTP destination pointing to the Solution Manager SLD or LMDB. 

Please also see KBA 1952567 - How to remove no longer relevant managed systems from Solution Manager.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: why are inactive users in MyCareer SuccessFactors still getting a My Talent Plan?
entry.content: We have employees that are withdrawn from our company and are no longer in SuccessFactors but their IN-PROGRESS or empty MTP is still viewable and receiving notifications?

entry.title: GR - Statistical FS items deliver in the content 1SG is missing
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

After activating the content 1SG, we identified that FS items deliver in this content are missing.

As an example, here a FS item that is missing "$000000SHG - group shares"

We cannot found  task 2101 – ABCOI Consolidation of investments. 

 

In the documentation, we have find this information that can be relevant for us :

 

"Statistical FS items are created automatically by task DIGITS – ABCOI Consolidation of investments. You should run this task in a test mode the very first time you use group reporting with activity-based consolidation of investments"

 

URL

 

As we don't use activity-based consolidation of investments, how I can generate these FS items missing?

Do we need to create these elements manually?

Also, in our system, we are not able to see the task DIGITS – ABCOI Consolidation of investments.

 

Could you please help us?

 

Please find in attachment My Selected Scope if needed.

 

Many thank in advance

Best PERSON_NAME,

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GR - Statistical FS items deliver in the content 1SG...
entry.content:
Statistical FS items are created automatically by task 2101 – ABCOI Consolidation of investments. You should run this task in a test mode the very first time you use group reporting with activity-based consolidation of investments.

" As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, new customers cannot use the Consolidation of Investments (Activity-Based) function. Customers who have been using this function prior to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 release can continue to do so."

--Solution--

You are new customer and cannot use Activity-based COI anymore in Cloud system.

You can use only Rule based COI for now.

" As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, new customers cannot use the Consolidation of Investments (Activity-Based) function. Customers who have been using this function prior to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 release can continue to do so."

FS item "$000000SHG - group shares" is only used on ABCOI and you don't need to worry about this missing.

entry.title: Re: Understanding the Technology Behind SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) - Out of the box 'Insight App&&
entry.content:
HI @VenuGaddam 

Will SAP Partners be allowed to Develop to  Insight Apps as  Partner Business Content.

Thanks

Afshin

entry.title: Re: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile...
entry.content: Thank you for feedback. That's weird. The button should be appearing. Then it's better to create a ticket for this issue.

entry.title: How to populate Table Key in BPCA?
entry.content:
How to populate Table Key in BPCA?

Results always come ack with Table Key does not exist.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to populate Table Key in BPCA?
entry.content:
Regarding Tables:

- Table keys, calculation in BPCA:
The transport request of change as well as the TBOM, both have two kind of entities: 1. Objects 2.Table keys
o If a table has table keys, then the table will be in BPCA result only if it hits with its table keys
o If a table has no table keys, then it will be in BPCA result when it hits with the objectsPlease refer the "Table key" part in the help document.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/fbc7b5ecf5094fe0b6a2eb966160008f/fb1ce5f08a14454eb7ead8193db2491b.html?version=7.2.17

For more information about restrictions, see also SAP Note 2621178  (Restrictions for Table Key Recording in Dynamic TBOMs).

entry.title: Re: Guidelines on Variable Pay for Rating
entry.content:
@Olga_Skarla I just checked and you won't be able to build the same exact logic than in Compensation in your Variable Pay template unfortunately. But you could try a workaround like the below :

 

 

or you could look at completely removing these employees from the VarPay worksheet using the workaround explained here: https://blogs.sap.com/2022/05/27/how-to-use-performance-ratings-in-compensation-eligibility-rules/

All the best,
Xavier

I'm using the standard SAP package Integration of Service in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP Field Service Management and have been getting the error java.lang.NullPointerException in Notify Service Order Update from SAP Field Service Management to SAP S4HANA Cloud.

I've checked that it happens at the step 

I haven't made any updates regarding this iFlow so I'm not sure if SAP has updated anything last weekend.

Has anyone seen this error before?

Regards,

Minh

Alex

entry.content:
Hi Daniela ,

Nope. They can download the papm query results in Excel and perform analysis.

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Marked Systems for Deletion in SOLMAN 7.2 – Error CRM...
entry.content: Since this situation involves many details e.g. steps how the system got deleted, current system status in SLD, LMDB etc, I would suggest to log a case to SAP component SV-SMG-LDB to do a remote check in order to get a proper answer.

entry.title: Re: Not to capitalize foreign exchange difference to Asset
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Foreign Exchange Rate Difference Handling for Fixed Assets

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the standard process capitalizes foreign exchange rate differences between purchase orders and invoices to fixed assets. However, it is possible to configure the system to post these differences to the profit and loss (P&L) account instead. Here are the key points:

  1. Configuration Options:

    • You can configure how exchange rate differences are handled for incoming invoices in foreign currencies .
    • This configuration is done at the company code level .

  2. Available Methods:

    • Rate at Goods Receipt: Exchange rate differences for standard price materials, moving average price materials, and account-assigned orders are not allocated to inventory/consumption .
    • Rate at Invoice Receipt: Exchange rate differences for moving average price materials and account-assigned orders are allocated to inventory/consumption .

  3. Configuration Steps:

    • In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the activity ID 104318 "Configure How Exchange Rate Differences Are Treated" .
    • Select the appropriate method based on your requirements.

  4. Considerations:

    • For standard price materials, exchange rate differences can be allocated to inventory/consumption at period-end closing in actual costing when using the Rate at Invoice Receipt method .
    • Exchange rate differences for stock shortages with moving average price materials are not allocated to inventory .

  5. Impact on Asset Valuation:

    • The chosen method will affect how foreign exchange differences are treated in relation to asset valuation.
    • By selecting the appropriate method, you can control whether these differences are capitalized or expensed to P&L.

  6. Additional Options:

    • For more complex scenarios, you may need to consider custom developments or additional configurations to fully meet your requirements.

It's important to note that changing these settings may have significant impacts on financial reporting and asset valuation. Therefore, it's recommended to thoroughly test any changes in a non-production environment and consult with your financial team to ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies.

entry.title: Re: EC promotion eligibility and Mass upload
entry.content:
Thought adding this link was relevant based on what Florin described (it's a pretty recent blog).

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/how-to-publish-data-from-comp-info-to-job-info/ba-p/14003896

entry.title: Re: Cost centers master data : How to correct company code
entry.content:
Correcting Company Code Assignment for Cost Centers

Based on the information provided, there isn't a direct way to change the company code assignment for cost centers without changing the cost center codes themselves. However, here are some key points and potential approaches to address this issue:

  1. Master Data Changes:

    • Changing the company code assignment in cost center master data after transactions have been posted is generally not allowed due to the risk of data inconsistencies [1].

  2. Creating New Cost Centers:

    • The most straightforward approach might be to create new cost centers with the correct company code assignment [2].

  3. Potential Workarounds:

    • If no transactional history exists, creating a new edition of the cost centers and changing the company code might be possible, but this can lead to activation issues in ECC systems [3].
    • In some cases, reversing all transactions posted to the cost centers might allow for changes, but this is not always guaranteed and can be complex [1].

  4. System Constraints:

    • SAP systems typically prevent changing company code assignments on organizational units like cost centers to maintain data integrity across Financial Accounting and Controlling [1][2].

  5. Considerations for New Approach:

    • If creating new cost centers is necessary, consider the impact on existing reports, allocations, and other processes that may reference the old cost center codes.
    • Ensure proper mapping between old and new cost centers for historical data analysis.

  6. Best Practice:

    • Before making any changes, thoroughly test the proposed solution in a non-production environment.
    • Consult with your SAP support team or a certified consultant for guidance specific to your SAP version and configuration.

Given the complexity and potential risks involved, it's recommended to carefully evaluate the options and possibly consult with SAP experts to determine the best course of action for

entry.title: Is there a method to effectively clear these fixed asset depreciation records?
entry.content:
The customer has identified that there are hundreds of assets with accumulated depreciation amounts recorded for last year. They would like to clear this data from the production environment ahead of the second go live.

Could you advise if there is a method to effectively clear these depreciation records?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a method to effectively clear these fixed as...
entry.content:
If you have transferred legacy data with errors to the Q system, either manually or using the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit, you can completely delete this incorrect data.

To do so, use the Reset Transaction Data job template from the app Schedule Accounting Data Corrections.

You use this job template to delete master data and transaction data from Asset Accounting, along with other accounting data.

Note

You can only use the job template in the quality management system (Q system), and not in the production system (P system).

 

On production you can only reverse one by one, there is no API or mass reversal tool. The reversal will reverse both the APC and cumulative depreciation amounts as they would be part of the one journal entry number.

  • The customer could reverse normal postings like an APC posting.
  • The manual depreciation in opposite to the normal depreciation values (ordinary/special) could be reversed similar by just reversing the related posting.
  • The normal depreciation posting to G/L happens through the depreciation posting run. And this run could not be reversed directly. But if there is no depreciation calculated again by for example changing the depreciation key to 0000 this will ‘reverse’ the already posted depreciation with the next depreciation posting run, i.e. in sum the values will be 0.

entry.title: Re: Account 64002000 requires an account assignment relev...
entry.content:
Dear Jeremy,

Thank you so much for your response! I followed your guidance and successfully resolved the issue.

I truly appreciate your help once again!

 

Best regards,

Yahaha

entry.title: Re: Customization - Marking Class Attendance/Completion via Barcode/Link by user/participants
entry.content: I guess its been awhile since I used this functionality. In the past when i was an instructor, i was also an admin. I had used an ipad for class attendance processing the qrcode from the notification or mobile app of the student. I need to implement this again but at this company, the instructors do not have permissions to add to learning history which means that This still requires an admin to process. I need the attendance of the student to then provide item that the classes are scheduled on to mark completion  for the student.

entry.title: F110 UNABLE TO OFFSET THE CREDIT NOTE DURING PAYMENT
entry.content:
Could you kindly advise on the issue that occurred when attempting to knock off the payment using F110, as the Credit Note (CN) could not be included?

 

The error message when edit the proposal as following :

entry.title: Some Service Order are not visible in the Data Source "CRMSORHB"
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support team,

Some Service Orders are not coming through via the Data Source "CRMSORHB".

Steps to reproduce the issue.
Go to Business Analytics WC----> Data sources-----> Open Data source "CRMSORHB"
Enter the ID in service order field in the selection, the ID is not found in value help and hence not able to be shown in the data source.


Thanks & Regards
Nagesh


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Some Service Order are not visible in the Data Source...
entry.content:
Dear requester, 

The report/data source will only display/retrieve Service Order documents which meet the following parameters:

1. Consistent

AND

2. Released OR Not Relevant

You can get more information from the KBA: 2124318 - Service Orders with the status "In Preparation" missing from Service Order Header Data Source

Thanks,

Adie
